title: vittadinia pustulata
intro: Vittadinia pustulata, also known as the woolly-heads or woolly daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Vittadinia pustulata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
